Description2.zh: 可能掉落[IncursionMedallionPreventDestabilise|华塔洛蒂的纹章]，[IncursionMedallionRerollRestrictedRoom|海幽夏的纹章]， [IncursionMedallionAddRoom|武罗摩提的纹章]， [IncursionMedallionAddAdditionalRestrictedRoom|埃斯塔祖提的纹章]或[IncursionMedallionAddTempleModifier|赞提佩的纹章]

Description.en:
Contains a Unique Item
Contains the Morphology Mechanism which can be used to modify [Corrupted] Unique Items
Room [IncursionDestabilization|Destabilises] once device is used
Description.zh:
内含一件传奇物品
内含形态重塑工坊，可用于改造[Corrupted|被腐化]的传奇物品
使用该装置后，房间将[IncursionDestabilization|瓦解]

Description2.en: May drop [IncursionMedallionPreventDestabilise|Juatalotli's Medallion], [IncursionMedallionRerollRestrictedRoom|Hayoxi's Medallion], [IncursionMedallionAddRoom|Uromoti's Medallion], [IncursionMedallionAddAdditionalRestrictedRoom|Estazunti's Medallion] or [IncursionMedallionAddTempleModifier|Zantipi's Medallion]
Description2.zh: 可能掉落[IncursionMedallionPreventDestabilise|华塔洛蒂的纹章]，[IncursionMedallionRerollRestrictedRoom|海幽夏的纹章]， [IncursionMedallionAddRoom|武罗摩提的纹章]， [IncursionMedallionAddAdditionalRestrictedRoom|埃斯塔祖提的纹章]或[IncursionMedallionAddTempleModifier|赞提佩的纹章]

Description.en:
Defeating the Architect allows use of Xipocado's Console which can be used to place various [IncursionRestrictedRoom|Restricted Rooms]
Defeating the Architect also unlocks [IncursionMedallions|Medallions]
Description.zh:
击败建筑师后，即可使用夏波卡多的控制台，可用于放置各种[IncursionRestrictedRoom|秘藏房间]
击败建筑师还将解锁[IncursionMedallions|纹章]

Description2.en: May drop [IncursionMedallionAddRoom|Uromoti's Medallion], [IncursionMedallionRerollRoomCards|Puhuarte's Medallion] or [IncursionMedallionAddTempleModifier|Zantipi's Medallion]
Description2.zh: 可能掉落[IncursionMedallionAddRoom|武罗摩提的纹章]， [IncursionMedallionRerollRoomCards|普华特的纹章]或[IncursionMedallionAddTempleModifier|赞提佩的纹章]

Description.en:
Contains Rare Treasury Chests containing Currency
Room [IncursionDestabilization|Destabilises] once accessible
Description.zh:
内含包含通货的稀有金库秘箱
在可进入后，房间将[IncursionDestabilization|瓦解]

Description.en:
Contains a Historic Chest containing a random [LineageSupports|Lineage Support Gem]
Room [IncursionDestabilization|Destabilises] once accessible
Description.zh:
内含包含随机[LineageSupports|血脉辅助宝石]的史迹秘箱
在可进入后，房间将[IncursionDestabilization|瓦解]

Description.en:
Contains a Rune Cache containing [Rune|Runes]
Room [IncursionDestabilization|Destabilises] once accessible
Description.zh:
内含包含[Rune|符文]的符文秘藏箱
在可进入后，房间将[IncursionDestabilization|瓦解]

Description.en:
Contains the Corrupted Precursor Machine which allows the [Corrupted|Corruption] of a [Tablet|Tablet]
Room [IncursionDestabilization|Destabilises] once accessible
Description.zh:
内含已腐化的先驱机械，可用于[Corrupted|腐化]一件[Tablet|石板]
在可进入后，房间将[IncursionDestabilization|瓦解]

Description.en:
Contains a Reliquary Display which holds a Unique item
Room [IncursionDestabilization|Destabilises] once accessible
Description.zh:
内含包含一件传奇物品的遗珍展柜
在可进入后，房间将[IncursionDestabilization|瓦解]

Description.en:
Completion unlocks access to Atziri's Chamber
Room [IncursionDestabilization|Destabilises] once accessible
Description.zh:
完成后即可解锁通往阿兹里殿堂的入口
在可进入后，房间将[IncursionDestabilization|瓦解]

Description.en:
Contains the Extraction Workbench which can be used to destroy an [Equipment] item, returning any [Augment|Augments] socketed in it
Room [IncursionDestabilization|Destabilises] once accessible
Description.zh:
内含萃取工作台，可用于摧毁一件[Equipment|装备]，并返还其镶嵌的所有[Augment|增幅器]
在可进入后，房间将[IncursionDestabilization|瓦解]

Description.en: Complete the Royal Access Chamber to unlock
Description.zh: 完成皇家谒见厅以解锁

Description.en: Room [IncursionDestabilization|Destabilises] once accessible
Description.zh: 在可进入后，房间将[IncursionDestabilization|瓦解]
